caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt that reads "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" is seated in a room filled with framed photos and clothing racks. A microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. To his left, a white mannequin wears a white long-sleeved shirt. Throughout the sequence, the man shifts his posture and looks down, moving his hands. In the background, racks of colorful clothing and multiple framed pictures adorn the walls. A circular logo and the red text "BIG FELIX" appear as overlays in the bottom corners of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man lowers his head further, eventually looking down and away from the microphone while adjusting something out of view.
